title: pontia pallens
intro: Pontia pallens, also known as pale swallowtail plant or pale milkweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The plant contains medicinal properties due to the presence of cardenolides, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pontia pallens include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Pontia pallens can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
